data.description: Today, April 29, is Shōwa Day, so the Japanese stock market is closed.

data.title: Global Times: From seawater to green hydrogen, and beyond, Qingdao charts a new growth path
data.description: In Beijing on April 28, 2026, at the expansive coastal industrial park of Sinopec Qingdao Refining & Chemical Co, a leading oil refiner in China, a new innovative facility operates quietly. The facility stands out amid the vast industrial landscape, showcasing a significant development in the sector.
TRUMP SET TO NOMINATE MCMASTER FOR THE TREASURY'S FINANCIAL MARKETS POSITION.
Oruka Therapeutics Announces Pricing of Upsized $700 Million Underwritten Public Offering

data.title: Tamarack Resort Announces 2026 Summer Events Lineup and Marina Debut
data.description: In Tamarack, Idaho, on April 28, 2026, it was announced that Tamarack Resort is gearing up for the 2026 summer season with notable developments. The resort will introduce new offerings, expand recreational activities, and host various events from spring to fall. Key highlights include the debut of the Tamarack Marina, presenting an array of opportunities for visitors to indulge in the scenic surroundings. This initiative underlines a series of enhancements, indicative of the resort's commitment to providing an enriched experience for guests.

data.title: Black Hills Corp. Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: The first-quarter earnings call and webcast for 2026 are scheduled to take place on Thursday, May 7th.

data.title: THE COOLTURE REVOLUTION: REALTY ONE GROUP INTERNATIONAL CRUSHES CORPORATE STAGNATION
data.description: The leading and fastest-growing family-owned real estate powerhouse in the world has demonstrated why Wall Street cannot rival their heart and soul. Based in Laguna Niguel, California, as of April 28, 2026, this company has emerged as the largest in the industry. Amidst the current landscape where Wall Street executives and corporate entities dominate, this family-owned business shines through with its unique approach and values.

data.title: Greenberg Traurig Selected as Winner and Finalist in 2026 California Legal Awards
data.description: On April 28, 2026, prestigious global law firm Greenberg Traurig, LLP received recognition in one category and was named a finalist in another at the 2026 California Legal Awards. The awards, organized by The Recorder and Law.com, will honor recipients at a ceremony on June 24 at the Sheraton Grand.

data.title: Geographer and Rare Earths Thought Leader Dr. Julie Klinger Shares Insights on Impact Podcast with John Shegerian
data.description: Geographer and Associate Professor Julie Michelle Klinger, Ph.D. from the University of Wisconsin, Madison, a top expert on rare earth supply chain, will be a guest on the Impact Podcast hosted by John Shegerian. The podcast received a Webby Award and focuses on discussing the current status of rare earth and energy supply security. Klinger will share her research insights in this episode.

data.title: Borealis Foods Announces $17.0 Million Refinancing Transaction with Oxus Capital to Repay Frontwell Facility and Support Operations
data.description: A major player in the food industry, Borealis Foods, has recently revealed a significant development. The company has finalized a $17.0 million refinancing deal with Oxus Capital. This transaction aims to repay the Frontwell facility and bolster ongoing operations. This move signifies a strategic financial maneuver for Borealis Foods, underscoring its commitment to optimizing resources and sustaining its growth trajectory.

data.title: Trimble Links SketchUp with Anthropic's Claude, Bringing New Conversational AI-powered Capabilities to 3D Modeling
data.description: Trimble, a company trading under the Nasdaq symbol TRMB, revealed on April 28, 2026, in Westminster, Colo., that they have developed a strategic partnership with Claude, an advanced AI assistant. This collaboration aims to streamline design processes by leveraging intuitive AI capabilities. The integration of Claude into Trimble's workflows enables a seamless transition from creative ideas to 3D models, revolutionizing how designers work. This innovative approach is set to reshape the industry and simplify complex tasks, ultimately boosting efficiency and creativity in design projects.

data.title: HelloNation Explains Common Mistakes That Hurt Injury Claims With Insights From Personal Injury Lawyer Joe Stanley
data.description: In a recent report, it was highlighted that issues with documents, evidence, and insurance communications may lead to a decrease in compensation for personal injury incidents in Oneonta, New York. The article discusses the prevalent errors that could compromise a personal injury lawsuit. This information was made available on April 28, 2026, and was not provided by the mentioned source.

data.title: TrialClinIQ Raises $150K from Caduceus Capital, Joins LAUNCH Accelerator, and Opens $1.5M Round to Transform Clinical Trial Access
data.description: A Houston-based AI-powered clinical trial recruitment platform, TrialClinIQ, focusing on advancing health equity, has secured a $150K pre-seed investment from Caduceus Capital Partners. The company has been chosen to be a part of the Caduceus LAUNCH digital health accelerator. Additionally, TrialClinIQ has initiated a $1.5M funding round to fuel its growth. Founded by Dr. Jontel Pierce, a board-certified neurologist and clinical researcher, TrialClinIQ aims to revolutionize the patient matching process for clinical trials.

data.title: FirstCash Announces Upsize and Pricing of $750 Million Senior Notes Due 2034
data.description: FirstCash Holdings, Inc. has reported from Fort Worth, Texas that its subsidiary, FirstCash, Inc., has increased and priced a private offering of senior notes due 2034 to $750,000,000, up $150,000,000 from the initial proposal. The Notes will have a 6.125% annual interest rate, paid semi-annually on May 1 and November 1, with the first payment scheduled for November 1, 2026.

data.title: Family Owned Italian Restaurant Experiance in Las Vegas
data.description: A long-standing Italian restaurant called Amedeo Pizza in Las Vegas is renowned for its commitment to serving genuine Italian dishes crafted from authentic recipes and using fresh ingredients. The restaurant, operating since 2000, aims to provide a dining experience that reflects the culinary traditions of Italy.

data.title: Medix Infusion Names Carmine DeNardo as President and CEO
data.description: A seasoned healthcare professional has been selected to lead the next stage of development and advancement in specialty and infusion services. Medix Infusion, based in Addison, Texas, revealed on April 28, 2026, that Carmine DeNardo has been named as the President and Chief Executive Officer. This appointment signifies a significant move for the company towards growth and innovation in the sector.

data.title: Overseas Network Appointed as Official Sub-Agent of On Location for the Sale of the FIFA World Cup 2026™ Official Hospitality Programme
data.description: Official Hospitality Agent for FIFA World Cup 26, On Location, has named Overseas Network as their Official Sub-Agent for sales. This appointment by FIFA for the World Cup 26™ was announced in Miami on April 28, 2026. On Location, the designated provider of hospitality services, continues to expand its network with this partnership.

data.title: Micro Center Launches Retail Media Offering to Reach Tech Enthusiasts and Builders
data.description: Micro Center Retail Media, utilizing Epsilon technology, integrates artificial intelligence, individualized identity targeting, and comprehensive analysis to provide tangible and quantifiable results for marketers. The initiative, based in Hilliard, Ohio, was launched on April 28, 2026. Micro Center, a prominent computer and electronics retailer, aims to leverage this new approach to advertising to drive enhanced outcomes for its clients.

data.title: Hongfeng Carbon Solutions Opens Two New Production and R&D Facilities in Japan
data.description: In Tokyo, there are new facilities being established that will specialize in the manufacturing and research of high-performance Carbon-based materials and components. These facilities will cater to various industries such as semiconductor, beamline, medical components, tools, graphite bipolar plates, precision nozzles, and industrial parts. This initiative aims to enhance production capabilities and promote innovation in these sectors.

data.title: Radiate Holdco, LLC Releases Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Radiate Holdco, LLC based in Princeton, New Jersey, disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025, on its investor website. The details were shared in compliance with the Indentures regulations.
